text.title: JPA / Hibernate Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

conclusion.verdict: skip-this-methodology — use Spring Data JDBC / jOOQ for reporting
skip-this-methodology — use jOOQ / native queries; JPA proxy cost dominates

branch.question: PR modifies an entity (@Column / @JoinColumn / type / rename)?

conclusion.verdict: ship paired Flyway migration in the same PR; expand-contract for rename/type
return DTOs from controllers; map inside transactional service

text.example: shape=transactional_oltp → entity_diff=true → flyway-migration-per-entity-change → ship V12__add_invoice_status.sql with the entity change.
